title: Konoko no nanatsu no oiwai ni
original_title: この子の七つのお祝いに
overview: Also known as: For My Daughter's 7th Birthday.  Many years following her mother’s suicide, Maya seeks out her father, who deserted them, for revenge. All intertwined with the investigation of journalists into local murders, the manipulations of a palmist known as the “blue moth”, and political corruption.
